positive: A groovy, retro-futuristic illustration of a stylized cassette tape floating in a neon-drenched sunset. The tape is surrounded by geometric shapes, palm trees, and gradient waves. Style: 1980s Vaporwave aesthetic, synthwave palette (magenta, cyan, electric blue), vector art quality, highly stylized, clean lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic photography, grainy, messy
